requirement: Add 3 securities pages to admin dashboard with sidebar navigation

tasks.title: API service functions + sidebar nav + routes
tasks.description:
Add securities API functions and wire navigation/routing. Part A — API functions in src/admin-ui/src/services/api.ts: Add these functions following the existing pattern (use apiFetch helper): - fetchSecuritiesInstruments(filters?, signal?) — GET /api/v1/securities/instruments - fetchSecuritiesInstrument(id, signal?) — GET /api/v1/securities/instruments/{id} - createSecuritiesInstrument(data) — POST /api/v1/securities/instruments - updateInstrumentStatus(id, status, reason?) — PUT /api/v1/securities/instruments/{id}/status - fetchSecuritiesOrders(filters?, signal?) — GET /api/v1/securities/orders - submitSecuritiesOrder(data) — POST /api/v1/securities/orders - cancelSecuritiesOrder(id) — DELETE /api/v1/securities/orders/{id} - fetchSecuritiesPositions(filters?, signal?) — GET /api/v1/securities/positions Part B — Sidebar navigation in src/admin-ui/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Add 3 entries to the navItems array (after existing items, before compliance section): - { label: 'Securities', path: '/dashboard/securities', adminOnly: true, icon: ChartBarIcon } - { label: 'Securities Orders', path: '/dashboard/securities-orders', adminOnly: true, icon: BookIcon } - { label: 'Securities Positions', path: '/dashboard/securities-positions', adminOnly: true, icon: DollarIcon } Part C — Routes in src/admin-ui/src/App.tsx: Add 3 Route entries inside the dashboard routes: - } /> - } /> - } /> Import the 3 page components (create placeholder exports for now if needed, or use lazy imports). Do NOT create the actual page files — T2 and T3 will create them. Create minimal placeholder files at: - src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesInstruments.tsx — export function SecuritiesInstrumentsPage() { return
Securities Instruments
} - src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesOrders.tsx — same placeholder - src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesPositions.tsx — same placeholder Run: cd src/admin-ui && npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- --run CX ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (all must pass): □ Loading state: N/A (placeholders) □ Empty state: N/A □ Error state: N/A □ Responsive: sidebar entries work on mobile (already handled by existing responsive CSS) □ Keyboard navigation: sidebar links are (natively accessible) □ Accessible: N/A □ Toast/feedback: N/A □ Form validation: N/A □ No raw technical errors visible to user □ Consistent styling: uses existing sidebar pattern Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Securities Instruments page
tasks.description:
Implement the full Securities Instruments page at src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesInstruments.tsx (replace the placeholder from T1).

Read existing page patterns: src/admin-ui/src/pages/Participants.tsx for DataGrid + usePolling + useToast + action buttons pattern.

The page should have:
1. Title: 'Securities Instruments'
2. A toolbar with a 'Create Instrument' button that opens a create modal
3. DataGrid showing instruments with columns: ticker, name, asset_class (with StatusBadge), lot_size, tick_size, trading_status (with StatusBadge), actions
4. Actions column: 'Halt'/'Resume' button (based on current status) + status change via updateInstrumentStatus API
5. Create instrument modal/dialog with fields: ticker, name, asset_class (select: EQUITY/BOND/ETF), lot_size (number), tick_size (number), currency (text, default MNT), exchange_code (text). Form validation: all fields required, lot_size > 0, tick_size > 0
6. Use usePolling to fetch instruments every 15s
7. Pass loading={isLoading} to DataGrid
8. Use useToast for success/error feedback on create and status change
9. Export business logic as pure functions for testability

Create CSS module: src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesInstruments.module.css

CX ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (all must pass):
□ Loading state: shows skeleton/spinner while data loads
□ Empty state: meaningful message when no data exists (not blank screen)
□ Error state: user-friendly error message with retry action (not raw error dump)
□ Responsive: works on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1280px+)
□ Keyboard navigation: all interactive elements reachable via Tab, activatable via Enter/Space
□ Accessible: proper ARIA labels, semantic HTML (nav, main, button not div), color contrast 4.5:1+
□ Toast/feedback: user actions produce visible confirmation (save → 'Saved', delete → 'Deleted')
□ Form validation: inline errors shown on blur, submit disabled until valid
□ No raw technical errors visible to user (no stack traces, no 'undefined', no 'NaN')
□ Consistent styling: uses project design tokens/theme, not arbitrary colors/sizes

Run: cd src/admin-ui && npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- --run

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Securities Orders + Positions pages
tasks.description:
Implement the Securities Orders and Securities Positions pages (replace placeholders from T1).

Read existing patterns: src/admin-ui/src/pages/OrderBook.tsx for order display, src/admin-ui/src/pages/Positions.tsx for positions display.

**Securities Orders page** (src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesOrders.tsx):
1. Title: 'Securities Order Book'
2. Instrument selector dropdown (fetch instruments, select one to view its orders)
3. DataGrid showing orders for selected instrument: side (BUY/SELL with color), order_type, quantity, price, filled_quantity, status (StatusBadge), created_at
4. 'Submit Order' button → modal with fields: instrument_id (select), side (BUY/SELL), order_type (LIMIT/MARKET), quantity (number), price (number, disabled for MARKET), time_in_force (select: GTC/IOC/FOK/DAY)
5. Form validation: quantity > 0, price > 0 for LIMIT orders
6. Cancel button on PENDING/PARTIALLY_FILLED orders
7. usePolling every 10s, loading to DataGrid, toast on submit/cancel
8. Recent trades section below orders: DataGrid showing trades for the instrument (price, quantity, trade_date)

**Securities Positions page** (src/admin-ui/src/pages/SecuritiesPositions.tsx):
1. Title: 'Securities Positions'
2. DataGrid showing positions: instrument (ticker via instrument lookup or just ID), quantity, avg_cost, market_value, unrealized_pnl (with green/red color)
3. usePolling every 30s, loading to DataGrid
4. Export to CSV button

Create CSS modules for both pages.

CX ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (all must pass):
□ Loading state: shows skeleton/spinner while data loads
□ Empty state: meaningful message when no data exists (not blank screen)
□ Error state: user-friendly error message with retry action
□ Responsive: works on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1280px+)
□ Keyboard navigation: all interactive elements reachable via Tab
□ Accessible: proper ARIA labels, semantic HTML
□ Toast/feedback: user actions produce visible confirmation
□ Form validation: inline errors shown on blur, submit disabled until valid
□ No raw technical errors visible to user
□ Consistent styling: uses project design tokens/theme

Run: cd src/admin-ui && npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- --run

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: CX review: securities pages
tasks.description:
Review all 3 securities pages against the CX checklist. Score each of 10 items. Fix gaps directly. Target >= 7/10.

Verify:
1. Loading: all DataGrids have loading={isLoading}
2. Empty: InboxIcon + message when no instruments/orders/positions
3. Error: try/catch with toast on all API calls
4. Responsive: pages work at 375px (DataGrid scrollable)
5. Keyboard: modals, buttons, selects all Tab-reachable
6. A11y: modal has role=dialog aria-modal, form labels
7. Toast: create/halt/resume/submit/cancel all show toast
8. Validation: create instrument + submit order forms validate
9. No raw errors: no undefined/NaN in empty states
10. Styling: uses project CSS modules, StatusBadge for status

Run: cd src/admin-ui && npm test -- --run

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md with CX score and fixes made.
